festival.name: When Next We Meet
festival.tagline: Three days of music, wellness, and community in Clonmel.
festival.description: When Next We Meet is a three-day festival in Clonmel featuring live music across multiple stages, wellness sessions, practical visitor support, and late-night after parties.
highlights: Soft Launch opening night on Friday
Root & Rise wellness sessions on Saturday and Sunday
Main Stage, Hidden Gems Stage, and after party programming

schedule.label: Saturday 30 May
notes: Root & Rise wellness runs from 1:00 PM to 4:00 PM.

schedule.label: Sunday 31 May
notes: Root & Rise wellness runs from 1:00 PM to 4:00 PM.

wellnessArea.name: Root & Rise
activities: Quiet space away from festival crowds
wellnessArea.notes: Add-on tickets should be purchased in advance to guarantee entry. Limited availability on the door.

recommendations: Bring suncream, sunglasses, raincoats, and layers.
Wear comfortable sturdy footwear for uneven ground.
Blankets are welcome for hay bales, lawns, or wrapping up.

seatingAndAccessibility.restrictions: Camping chairs are not permitted within the festival arena due to crowd safety, emergency access, and venue protection.
seatingAndAccessibility.amenities: Seating and rest areas including benches and hay bale seating are available across the site but not guaranteed.
seatingAndAccessibility.accessibilityAccommodations: Attendees requiring additional accessibility accommodations should contact organizers in advance with their ticket order number.

ageRestrictions.exceptions: Babes-in-arms without prams and rare exceptions may be considered in very limited circumstances at the organizers' discretion.

ticketsAndEntry.resale: Organizers can help facilitate resales if a ticket type is sold out. Private resales are also permitted.
ticketsAndEntry.entryRules: Have your ticket ready for scanning on arrival. Tickets are valid for one entry wristband, and re-entry is permitted with an intact wristband.

parking.general: Carpooling or public transport is encouraged. Ample free and street parking is available in Clonmel Town Centre a short walk away.
parking.raheenCollege: Free parking is available directly beside the venue at Raheen College. Follow festival signage and note that it is locked overnight.
parking.accessibilityParking: On-site parking is reserved for attendees with accessibility requirements and should be flagged in advance by email.

taxis.note: Taxis in Clonmel are scarce, especially late at night, so journeys home should be organized in advance.

lastServices.label: CL9 towards Crann Ard from Parnell St
CL9 towards Crann Ard from Showgrounds
CL9 towards Ard Gaoithe from Showgrounds
CL9 towards Ard Gaoithe from Parnell St

rulesAndConduct: Respect neighbours when arriving and leaving festival grounds.
Mind your belongings and leave valuables at home.
Be sound, be kind to staff and volunteers, and enjoy yourselves.
